description_long: This is a modern, two-seater sofa with a sleek, boxy silhouette and a deep, low profile. The upholstery is a glossy, black leather-like material with visible creases and subtle textural patterns, giving it a slightly worn-in, comfortable appearance. The sofa features two large, loose seat cushions and two matching backrest cushions, both of which are plush and slightly overstuffed. The armrests are straight, wide, and extend to the same height as the backrest, creating a uniform rectangular frame. Four short, cylindrical legs, likely made of metal, support the sofa at each corner, elevating it slightly off the ground. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern apartments.
description: A sleek, black leather-like two-seater sofa with wide armrests, plush cushions, and short metal legs. Its glossy finish and boxy shape give it a modern, urban appeal.
description_view_0: Side view showing the sofa's wide, straight armrest and the depth of the seat and back cushions.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the smooth, continuous backrest and the glossy, textured upholstery.
description_view_2: Opposite side view mirroring view 0, displaying the other armrest and the sofa's overall depth.
description_view_3: Front view revealing two large seat cushions, two back cushions, and the full width of the sofa with both armrests visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Two large, loose seat cushions and two matching loose back cushions, all uniform in size and placed side by side.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, wide, and rectangular armrests at both ends, matching the height of the backrest and covered in the same glossy material.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, cylindrical legs positioned at each corner, likely metal with a dark finish, slightly elevating the sofa.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest with two large, loose cushions providing support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black with a subtle, natural leather-like texture and visible creases; no decorative stitching or patterned detailing.
